description: Create a tiddler titled 'Financial Summary Report' to dynamically track transactions. The wiki contains income tiddlers tagged 'Contribution' and expense tiddlers tagged 'Expense', each with a numeric 'amount' field. The report must calculate and display 'Total Contributions' (sum of all Contribution amounts), 'Total Expenses' (sum of all Expense amounts), and 'Net Balance' (Total Contributions minus Total Expenses). Use dynamic wikitext filter operators and variable assignments to ensure the report updates automatically without hardcoded values. Save the tiddler upon completion.
